Notes: First round game of the Golden State Athletic Conference Women's Basketball
Tournament.  The Master's is ranked #16, Westmont is ranked #19.
The Master's advances to the GSAC semifinals and will play at Point Loma
Game.Officials: Mike Hay,  Rick Spitzer,  Michael Carter
